title: Hannibál tanár úr
writer: Zoltán Fábri, István Gyenes, Ferenc Móra
actors: Ernö Szabó, Noémi Apor, Emmi Buttykay
plot: When a Latin teacher publishes an essay on the Carthaginian General Hannibal, he is quickly hailed as a celebrity genius, but in reality has become an unwitting pawn of far-right politicians.
